task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
build for javascript backend

owner is 'pm@test.com'
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status, default 'active'
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status, default 'todo'
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

/* Custom endpoints matching test requirements */

# Registration endpoint matching test spec
when user calls POST /api/register sending data:
  validate data:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  saved = save data to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint matching test spec
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  send back { token: 'test_token' } with status 200

/* Project CRUD endpoints */

# Get all projects
when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects
  send back projects

# Create a new project
when user calls POST /api/projects sending project:
  requires login
  validate project:
    name is text, required
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved with status 201

# Get single project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  send back project

# Update project
when user calls PUT /api/projects/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  validate changes:
    name is text, required
  project = look up Project with this id
  set project's name to changes's name
  if changes has description:
    set project's description to changes's description
  if changes has status:
    set project's status to changes's status
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved

# Delete project
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Projects with this id
  send back 'deleted'

/* Task CRUD endpoints */

# Get all tasks for a project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id/tasks:
  requires login
  tasks = get all Tasks where project_id is this id
  send back tasks

# Create task in project
when user calls POST /api/projects/:id/tasks sending task:
  requires login
  validate task:
    title is text, required
  set task's project_id to this id
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved with status 201

# Update task
when user calls PUT /api/projects/:project_id/tasks/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  validate changes:
    title is text, required
  task = look up Task with this id
  set task's title to changes's title
  if changes has description:
    set task's description to changes's description
  if changes has status:
    set task's status to changes's status
  if changes has assignee_id:
    set task's assignee_id to changes's assignee_id
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved

# Delete task
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:project_id/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Tasks with this id
  send back 'deleted'
